A //fabrik:web route binds an injectable *httpserver.Server without other routes.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web v0.0.0
)

replace (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver => HTTPSERVERDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web => WEBDIR
)
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}{{ .Title }}{{ end }}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"
)

type HomePage struct {
	Title string
}

func (HomePage) Template() string { return "home" }

type Handlers struct{}

//fabrik:web GET /home
func (h *Handlers) Home(req *web.Request) (web.Response, error) {
	return web.View(HomePage{Title: "hi"}), nil
}

//fabrik:cli:command
func Serve(ctx cli.Context, server *httpserver.Server) error {
	return server.Run(ctx)
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/httpserver"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
	web2 "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"

	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name: "app",
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name: "serve",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					server, err := buildServe(ctx)
					if err != nil {
						return err
					}
					return web.Serve(ctx, server)
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}

func buildServe(ctx context.Context) (*httpserver.Server, error) {
	// Providers
	webTemplates, err := templates.Load(web.Templates, "templates")
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	adapter := web2.NewAdapter(web2.WithRenderer(webTemplates))

	r := router.New()
	webHandlers := &web.Handlers{}

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/home", adapter.Wrap(webHandlers.Home))
	return httpserver.New(r, nil), nil
}
